name: jobworkerp-workflow
description: Create and edit workflow YAML compliant with jobworkerp-rs Custom Serverless Workflow DSL v1.0.0. Supports built-in runners (COMMAND, LLM, HTTP_REQUEST, GRPC_UNARY, DOCKER, PYTHON_COMMAND, WORKFLOW, SLACK_POST_MESSAGE), MCP servers, plugin runners, flow control (for, fork, switch, try-catch), and jq/Liquid runtime expressions.
